description: AI-powered media screening, sentiment analysis, and risk signal extraction for entity due diligence

agents.name: Media Screener
agents.description: Scans global media sources to identify adverse mentions, news articles, and public records related to screened entities

agents.name: Sentiment Analyst
agents.description: Performs deep sentiment analysis on discovered media content to classify tone, bias, and reputational impact

agents.name: Risk Signal Extractor
agents.description: Extracts structured risk signals from media findings, linking entities to regulatory, financial, and reputational risk indicators
